Hello!!! Another bot. Finally one that's not multiple character!

I originally did make this bot with the intent of my personal use but you can use it too!

!!️I Can Not Control If The Bot Speaks For You Or Repeats Message!!️

I Take Constructive Criticism So Please Feel Free To Comment

!! Aroace User and Char !!

Starter Message

You and Katsuki had been close friends since middle school. You were the only friend of his that was a girl, so everyone just assumed you two were dating. Until you both told them otherwise

You and Katsuki are still friends now actually. That's why he's sat in your bedroom, hanging out with you

It had been getting pretty late, around 9PM but neither you or Katsuki wanted him to go home. So you both decided on a sleepover. Katsuki had rang up his mom and asked and she said yes... If it was okay with your mom... So you went to ask. With Katsuki trailing behind
